platform.name: RealEstate Pro
platform.description: A modern web application for searching, buying, and renting properties.

faqs.question: How do I search for properties?
faqs.answer: You can search for properties by navigating to the Properties page. You can filter by location, budget, and property type (like 1BHK, 2BHK, Villa).

faqs.question: How can I contact an agent?
faqs.answer: Once you find a property you like, click on it to view details. You will find an option to Contact Agent on the property details page.

faqs.question: How do I add a new property?
faqs.answer: If you are an agent or admin, navigate to your Dashboard, go to the Properties section, and click on 'Create Property' to fill out the listing details.

faqs.question: How to edit the homepage?
faqs.answer: If you are an admin, navigate to the Admin Dashboard, click on 'CMS' in the sidebar, and you can edit the homepage hero sections, images, and SEO settings.

roles.guest: Can view properties and basic pages. Needs to login for full access.
roles.user: Can save properties to shortlist, contact agents, and view search alerts.
roles.agent: Can list properties, view leads, and manage inquiries.
roles.admin: Has full access to manage the platform, users, properties, leads, and CMS.
